statement: In every magma, Equation 1971 (`x = (y * (z * x)) * (w * y)`) implies Equation 3301 (`x * x = y * (z * (w * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0042
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z x)) (op w y))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op y (op z (op w y)))
